name: PR-quality eval gate persists its computed result to pr-corpus/quality-eval.json with timestamp and dataset hash
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus/grades && for i in $(seq 1 20); do printf '{"pr":%d,"graded_useful":true,"usefulness":4}\n' "$i" > pr-corpus/grades/p${i}.json; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/quality-eval.sh" --grades-dir pr-corpus/grades --out pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f pr-corpus/quality-eval.json ] && grep -q '"computed_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"' pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && grep -q '"dataset_hash"' pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && echo ok 1>&2
